slots.notes: HERO headline: 'Build your next gen I workflow' (literal, including the double quotes, appears inline, there's no separate styling)
Hero primary CTA button label: 'Get Started' (literal)

Feature cards - 3x Square 1object-contain (64*64px ) icon images that go into each of the three feature cards/how-it-works steps . Nothing fussy ,  inset simple icons. No border no background . Flat  style.

Testimonial section background image. This reference photo is a generic stock photo of an office - something you could find on Unsplash. There's nothing special about it, so you can replace it with any generic office stock photo.

mechanic: A simple one-page scroll page, sections are regular blocks, nothing moves or animates, standard static layout
techDelivery: React + Tailwind CSS with postcss for variable colors and spacing.
reskingNotes: All copy is hardcoded in JSX. Nav links  ['Solutions', 'Pricing', 'About'] + 'Get Started' CTA. How It Works section with three steps (cards) and a subheading / step heading / step body. Features section (subheading / three cards with icon + title + body). Testimonial section with a background image, 10)x rounded card overlay, there is a 'John Doe' string as testimonier, and 'See about us' text right. Footer with 2 columns and an orange CTA on the right Side. The color palette uses an off-white ground (#FFFFFF), accent (*0A72BB), black ink, grey muted (#666) and border (#e0e, e). Fonts are 'Brooks', sans-serif for display and 'Source Sans 3', sans-serif fos body. No media queries (no breakpoints at horizontal layout).
